---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a new Skill, MCP tool, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description / 描述

Briefly describe the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Use Case / 使用场景

Describe when this feature would be needed and what problem it solves.

## Proposed Solution / 建议实现方式

If you have ideas, describe a feasible implementation approach.

## Affected Components / 涉及组件

- [ ] Skill definition (`skills/`)
- [ ] MCP Server (`shared/exam_memory/`)
- [ ] Target material (`targets/{target}/`)
- [ ] Shared cheatsheets or prompts (`shared/`, `prompts/`)
- [ ] Public documentation (`README`, `README_CN`, `START_HERE`, `AGENTS`, `CONTRIBUTING`)
- [ ] Other: ___
